aumentos.desc: Gain @Numrolls@ free Shop rerolls.
aumentos.name: Rolling For Days I

aumentos.desc: Champions that aren't holding items have a @dropchance*100@% chance to drop @Gold@ gold on death.
aumentos.name: Good For Something I

aumentos.desc: After losing your combat, gain @Gold@ gold and a free Shop reroll.
aumentos.name: Calculated Loss

aumentos.desc:
Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators and @Gold@ gold.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.
aumentos.name: Heroic Grab Bag+

aumentos.desc:
Gain @numunits@ @Tier@-cost champions.
Combat Start: @BuffedNumber@ random @Tier@-cost champions gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.
aumentos.name: Trifecta I

aumentos.desc: Gain a Deathblade. Deathblades permanently gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage whenever their holders score a takedown.
aumentos.name: Deadlier Blades

aumentos.desc: Gain @NumItems@ B.F. Swords. Your B.F. Swords grant +@BonusStat*100@% Attack Speed.
aumentos.name: Sword Overflow

aumentos.desc: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a @RerollPercent@% chance to gain a free reroll.
aumentos.name: Prismatic Ticket

CompleteItem1.desc: Attacks grant @FlatManaRestore@ bonus Mana.
CompleteItem1.name: Spear of Shojin

CompleteItem2.desc:
Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@
CompleteItem2.name: Deathblade

CompleteItem3.desc: Gain @ArmorPerEnemy@ Armor and @MRPerEnemy@ Magic Resist for each enemy targeting the holder.
CompleteItem3.name: Gargoyle Stoneplate

RadiantItem1.desc:
It glows in the presence of enemies. Or friends. Or anything alive, really.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Deathblade

ability.desc:
Hurl a chunk of magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing @ModifiedDebrisDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one.

Every @NumCasts@ casts, instead rip off all debris dealing @ModifiedDebrisRipDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage, then crush all the debris onto the target, dealing @ModifiedSlamDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and briefly stunning them.
ability.name: Psionic Crush

champItem.desc: Attacks grant @FlatManaRestore@ bonus Mana.
champItem.name: Spear of Shojin

champItem.desc:
Attacks and Abilities deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to enemies for @BurnDuration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
champItem.name: Morellonomicon

champItem.desc:

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

ability.desc:
Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck @NumStrikesForPassive@ times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.

Active: Shadow launches @NumActiveStrikes@ empowered strikes, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.
ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!

champItem.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerStack@% stacking Attack Speed every second.
champItem.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade

champItem.desc:
This humble hat can help you make, or unmake, the world itself.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_DeadlierCaps_TRAKey@
champItem.name: Rabadon's Deathcap

champItem.desc:
Attacks and Abilities @BurnPercent@% Burn and @HealingReductionPct@% Wound enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
champItem.name: Red Buff

S.tipSeo: Vex Fast 9 es una TFT comp flex AP enfocada en llegar rápido a nivel 9 y jugar alrededor de carries legendarios. Mantén alto HP y economía para estabilizar con Vex, Graves y unidades 5 cost en late game.

aumentos.desc: At the start of every round, lose the champion in the rightmost bench slot. After losing @CashoutCost@ gold of champions in this way, gain a powerful reward. Gain a 3-cost champion now. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Expedition_Tooltip@
aumentos.name: Expedition

aumentos.desc: Whenever you star up a champion that you fielded last combat, gain @NumRolls@ free Shop rerolls. Gain @Gold@ gold.
aumentos.name: On a Roll

aumentos.desc: Gain a locked chest each Stage between now and Stage @MaxNumChests@. Unlock each chest when you spend @GoldNeededPerChest@ gold on Shop rerolls. These chests persist until opened.
aumentos.name: Treasure Hunt

aumentos.desc:
Gain a random @UnitTier@-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.

Champion: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WorthTheWait@
aumentos.name: Worth the Wait

aumentos.desc: The next 1-cost champion you buy is 3-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.
aumentos.name: Construct a Companion

CompleteItem1.desc:
Gain Precision.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
CompleteItem1.name: Jeweled Gauntlet

CompleteItem2.desc: Attacks grant @FlatManaRestore@ bonus Mana.
CompleteItem2.name: Spear of Shojin

CompleteItem3.desc:
Damage from attacks and Abilities @MRShred@% Shred the target for @MRShredDuration@ seconds. This effect does not stack.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
CompleteItem3.name: Void Staff

RadiantItem1.desc:
It's witnessed - and unleashed - miracles and calamities both.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_DeadlierCaps_TRAKey@
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Rabadon's Deathcap

aumentos.desc:
Champions that fight in player combat cannot be benched or sold. Your team gains @HPScale*100@% Health, and @APScale@% Attack Damage and Ability Power after player combat.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_NoScoutNoPivot_TrackerTRAKEY_Holder@

aumentos.name: Prismatic Ticket

aumentos.desc:
All 3-star champions now count towards Swarmling power. At level @LevelRequirement@, while fielding @Num3StarUnits@ unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon the Apex Primordian. Gain 3 Primordian Champions and 2 Tiny Duplicators.

Unique 3-Star Champions Fielded: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / @Num3StarUnits@

Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ / @LevelRequirement@

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

Remix Rumble Championship, 2023

ability.desc: Toss a disco bubble at the target that deals <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends @NumProjectiles@ globs towards nearby enemies that deal <magicDamage>@ModifiedFirstBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage. On cast, Nami enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.
ability.name: Bubble Pop

champItem.desc:
Gain Precision.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
champItem.name: Jeweled Gauntlet

champItem.desc: Attacks grant @BaseManaOnHit@ bonus Mana, increased to @ManaOnCrit@ if they critically strike.
champItem.name: Nashor's Tooth

champItem.desc: Attacks grant @FlatManaRestore@ bonus Mana.
champItem.name: Spear of Shojin

champTrait.desc: The holder gains the Space Groove trait. On cast, the holder enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.
champTrait.name: Space Groove Emblem

A.tipSeo: La comp de Space Groove vertical destaca por ser fuerte en todas las etapas de la partida, priorizando items de AP y regeneración de mana para Nami con mucha linea frontal para su escalado

aumentos.desc:
Round start: items on your bench are randomized.

Gain @NumComponents@ random component.
aumentos.name: Pandora's Items

aumentos.desc: Your Tactician loses @Health@ Health, but after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats, gain @Gold@ gold.
aumentos.name: Risky Moves

aumentos.desc: Gain @Units@ random 1-cost champions now. If your bench is full at the end of player combat, gain @XP@ XP.
aumentos.name: Cluttered Mind

aumentos.desc:
When you reach Level 8, gain @NumRerolls@ Shop rerolls.

Runeterra Reforged Championship, 2023
aumentos.name: Epic Rolldown

aumentos.desc: Now and at the start of the next @NumStages@ stages, roll 3 dice. Gain various rewards based on their total.
aumentos.name: Expected Unexpectedness

CompleteItem1.desc: Attacks grant @ADOnAttack*100@% stacking Attack Damage, up to @MaxStacks@ attacks. After @MaxStacks@ attacks, gain @ASCapstone*100@% Attack Speed.
CompleteItem1.name: Kraken's Fury

CompleteItem2.desc:
Attacks and Abilities @BurnPercent@% Burn and @HealingReductionPct@% Wound enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
CompleteItem2.name: Red Buff

CompleteItem3.desc:
Combat Start: Gain @CombatStartMana@ Mana.

At @HealthThreshold@% Health, gain @TriggerMana@ Mana and a Shield equal to @ShieldHealthPercent@% max Health.
CompleteItem3.name: Protector's Vow

RadiantItem1.desc:
Attacks and Abilities @BurnPercent@% Burn and @HealingReductionPct@% Wound enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Red Buff

ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks bounce to strike @AttackNumEnemies@ times, dealing @PassivePercentReducedDamage*100@% reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target.

ability.desc:
Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing @BaseMissiles@ missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage with a @ProcChance@% Lucky chance of firing a mega missile that deals @ModifiedProcDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) instead.

Meep Bonus: Every @ModifiedMeepCooldown@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target, dealing @ModifiedMeepDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a one hex radius on impact.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.
ability.name: Asteroid Blaster

champItem.desc: Gain @ModifiedADAP*100@% additional Attack Damage and Ability Power from all sources.
champItem.name: Blue Buff

A.tipSeo: Corki Fast 8 es una de las TFT comps AD más fuertes del meta para jugar desde winstreak. Prioriza objetos BIS en Corki y Rammus para estabilizar nivel 8 y luego buscar top 1 con upgrades de late game.

aumentos.desc:
Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.
aumentos.name: Team Building

aumentos.desc:
Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators and @Gold@ gold.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

aumentos.desc: After losing your combat, gain @Gold@ gold and a free Shop reroll.
aumentos.name: Calculated Loss

B.tipSeo: Dark Stars es una de las TFT comps más fuertes del meta gracias su facilidad para acabar con la linea frontal enemiga, busca llegar a los 6 lo más pronto posible e itemizar tu Aurelion sol.

aumentos.desc: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.
aumentos.name: Group Hug I

aumentos.desc:
Gain a B.F. Sword. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ physical damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.

Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@
aumentos.name: Carve a Path

aumentos.desc: Gain a Giant Slayer. Giant Slayers gain their Damage Amp against all enemies instead of just Tanks.
aumentos.name: Indiscriminate Killer

aumentos.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items that build from B.F. Sword.
aumentos.name: Swordsmith

aumentos.desc:
Your team gains @HPPerMissingHP@ Health and @ASPerMissingHP@% Attack Speed per missing player Health.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComebackStory_Tooltip@
aumentos.name: Comeback Story

CompleteItem1.desc: At @HealthThreshold@% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal @MissingHealthRestore*100@% missing health.
CompleteItem1.name: Edge of Night

CompleteItem2.desc: Gain @DamageAmp*100@% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.
CompleteItem2.name: Giant Slayer

CompleteItem3.desc:
@ARReductionAmount@% Sunder enemies within @HexRange@ hexes. Gain @BonusResists@ Armor and Magic Resist for the first @BonusResistDuration@ seconds of combat.

Sunder: Reduce Armor
CompleteItem3.name: Evenshroud

RadiantItem1.desc:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Titan's Resolve

ability.desc:
Passive: Every third attack is a doubleslash that deals @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) bonus physical damage.

Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State for @Duration@ seconds, gaining @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage
ability.name: Psi Strikes

champItem.desc: At @HealthThreshold@% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal @MissingHealthRestore*100@% missing health.
champItem.name: Edge of Night

champItem.desc: Gain @DamageAmp*100@% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.
champItem.name: Giant Slayer

champItem.desc:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.
champItem.name: Titan's Resolve

B.tipSeo: La comp de Master Yi requiere alto tempo, prioriza Malware Matrix o Target Lock como item especial y objetos BIS como Filo de la Noche y Verdugo de Gigantes para que Yi carry domine el late game.

aumentos.desc:
Gain a B.F. Sword. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ physical damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.

Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@
aumentos.name: Carve a Path

aumentos.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health for each ally that starts combat in the front row.
aumentos.name: Boxing Lessons

aumentos.desc: Your team gains @Resistances@ Armor and Magic Resist for each ally that starts combat in the front two rows.
aumentos.name: Lineup

aumentos.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items that build from B.F. Sword.
aumentos.name: Swordsmith

aumentos.desc:
Gain a random Tank item. After @StartSeconds@ seconds of combat, your team gains @Stats@% bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.

TFT Paris Open, 2025
aumentos.name: Baron's Lair

CompleteItem1.desc: Attacks grant @ADOnAttack*100@% stacking Attack Damage, up to @MaxStacks@ attacks. After @MaxStacks@ attacks, gain @ASCapstone*100@% Attack Speed.
CompleteItem1.name: Kraken's Fury

CompleteItem2.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerStack@% stacking Attack Speed every second.
CompleteItem2.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade

CompleteItem3.desc:
Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% max Health.

Every @ICD@ seconds, deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to an enemy within @HexRange@ hexes for @BurnDuration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
CompleteItem3.name: Sunfire Cape

RadiantItem1.desc:
It glows in the presence of enemies. Or friends. Or anything alive, really.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Deathblade

ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches @MaxMarks@ marks, Wolf consumes the marks, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

Active: Jump up to @HexDistance@ hex away and fire arrows at the nearest @NumTargets@ targets, each dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain @NovaDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Now and every @NovaRepeatTimer@ seconds after, add a mark to all enemies.
ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit

aumentos.desc: Gain a Gargoyle Stoneplate. Combat start: Allies holding Gargoyle Stoneplate gain @HealthIncrease*100@% max Health if they're the only one in their row.
aumentos.name: Solo Plate

aumentos.desc:
Gain a Mogul's Mail. Champions holding Mogul's Mail take up 2 team slots but gain @BonusHealth@ Health and @DurabilityPct*100@% Durability.

Mogul's Mail gives gold as well as combat power.
Dragonlands Championship, 2022
aumentos.name: The Golden Dragon

aumentos.desc:
Gain an Artifact anvil now and after every @NumberOfCombats@ player combats.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.
aumentos.name: Living Forge

CompleteItem1.desc: Attacks grant @FlatManaRestore@ bonus Mana.
CompleteItem1.name: Spear of Shojin

CompleteItem2.desc: Critical Strikes grant @BuffDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for @Duration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.
CompleteItem2.name: Striker's Flail

CompleteItem3.desc:
Gain Precision.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
CompleteItem3.name: Infinity Edge

ability.desc: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards the current target for @Duration@ seconds. It deals <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage per second, reduced by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per enemy it passes through. Deathbeam ignores @MagicPen*100@% of the enemy's Magic Resist.
ability.name: Deathbeam

champItem.desc:

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_DeadlierCaps_TRAKey@
champItem.name: Rabadon's Deathcap

champItem.desc:
Gain Precision.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
champItem.name: Jeweled Gauntlet

champItem.desc:
Damage from attacks and Abilities @MRShred@% Shred the target for @MRShredDuration@ seconds. This effect does not stack.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
champItem.name: Void Staff

C.tipSeo: La composición de 6 Mecha es de las mejores para aprovechar los recursos adicionales como canjeo de anima, Artefactos o Radiantes ya que sus unidades cuentan por dos

aumentos.desc:
Round start: items on your bench are randomized.

Gain @NumComponents@ random component.
aumentos.name: Pandora's Items

aumentos.desc:
Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.
aumentos.name: Team Building

aumentos.desc: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.
aumentos.name: Anima Commander

aumentos.desc:
Arbiters add a second effect to their law.
Gain a Leona and a Zoe.
aumentos.name: Divine Amendment

aumentos.desc:
Gain @numunits@ @Tier@-cost champions. Allies gain @TeamAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.
Combat Start: @BuffedNumber@ random @Tier@-cost champions gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.
aumentos.name: Trifecta II

aumentos.desc: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a @RerollPercent@% chance to gain a free reroll.
aumentos.name: Prismatic Ticket

CompleteItem1.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerStack@% stacking Attack Speed every second.
CompleteItem1.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade

CompleteItem2.desc:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.
CompleteItem2.name: Titan's Resolve

CompleteItem3.desc: Once per combat at @HealthThreshold@% Health, gain a @ShieldHealthPercent@% max Health Shield that lasts up to @ShieldDuration@ seconds.
CompleteItem3.name: Bloodthirster

RadiantItem1.desc:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.
RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Titan's Resolve

ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBonusDamageToAttacks@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Orbs deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies they pass through, and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.
ability.name: Pale Cascade

champItem.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerStack@% stacking Attack Speed every second.
champItem.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade

champItem.desc:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.
champItem.name: Titan's Resolve

champItem.desc: Once per combat at @HealthThreshold@% Health, gain a @ShieldHealthPercent@% max Health Shield that lasts up to @ShieldDuration@ seconds.
champItem.name: Bloodthirster

C.tipSeo: La comp de Diana reroll se juega siempre y cuando la obtengas temprano en tu partida con objetos de escalado y supervivencia para convertirla en un one gril army

aumentos.desc: Whenever you star up a champion that you fielded last combat, gain @NumRolls@ free Shop rerolls. Gain @Gold@ gold.
aumentos.name: On a Roll

aumentos.desc: Gain a copy of each 1-cost champion.
aumentos.name: Missed Connections

aumentos.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.
aumentos.name: Trade Sector

aumentos.desc:
Champions that fight in player combat cannot be benched or sold. Your team gains @HPScale*100@% Health, and @APScale@% Attack Damage and Ability Power after player combat.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_NoScoutNoPivot_TrackerTRAKEY_Holder@
aumentos.name: NO SCOUT NO PIVOT

aumentos.desc:
Your team gains @NumADAP@% Attack Damage & Ability Power. This increases by @IncPerPlayerCombat@% after each player combat. 1-cost champions gain double.
@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EarlyLearning_TRAKey@
TFT Vegas Open, 2023
aumentos.name: Early Learnings

aumentos.desc: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a @RerollPercent@% chance to gain a free reroll.
aumentos.name: Prismatic Ticket

CompleteItem1.desc: Attacks grant @BaseManaOnHit@ bonus Mana, increased to @ManaOnCrit@ if they critically strike.
CompleteItem1.name: Nashor's Tooth

CompleteItem3.desc: Gain @ArmorPerEnemy@ Armor and @MRPerEnemy@ Magic Resist for each enemy targeting the holder.
CompleteItem3.name: Gargoyle Stoneplate

CompleteItem2.desc:
Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@
CompleteItem2.name: Deathblade

RadiantItem1.name: Radiant Gargoyle Stoneplate

ability.desc:
Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by Lucky chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between @ModifiedDamageMin@ (%i:scaleAP%) and @ModifiedDamageMax@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy.

3-Star Bonus: If a 9 is thrown, generate 1 gold.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

{"apiName":"TFT17_Lissandra","nombre":"Lissandra","characterName":"TFT17_Lissandra","coste":1,"sinergia":[{"apiName":"TFT17_DarkStar","desc":"(@MinUnits@) Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at @ExecuteHPPercent*100@% max health.
